childMarkdownRemark.rawMarkdownBody:
Hello 👋 my name is Bailey and I am a **junior** in **computer science** at the **University of Illinois**. My main interests are in application backend development, applied machine learning, and industry scale quantum computing! 
I am seeking a Summer 2019 internship in any of those fields 😃.

At the University of Illinois I lead [QUIUC](https://www.quiuc.org) and the [Association of Data Science and Analytics](http://adsa.cs.illinois.edu), work on my app Overheard with my roommate, and research educational tools under Professor Geoffrey Challen on [CS 125](cs125.cs.illinois.edu).

Outside of the classroom I enjoy amateur road cycling 🚲 and cooking 🥘 for my friends and family.
